Delante de una verdad largamente oculta

Falspawn were bearing down in a full assault of
ARKS Ship 128, the Themis.
Meanwhile, <%me>
rushed to the City Area with the hope that they
might still stop the tragedy unfolding that day.
They had but one objective: the rescue of a certain
very important girl.
-------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

Falspawn were assaulting the ARKS Ship 128, the Themis.
Meanwhile, <%me> rushed to the City
Area to stop the tragedy unfolding that day. They had but one
objective: the rescue of a certain very important girl.

- Create an Auxiliary

Complete Cofy's Client Order [Auxiliary Course]
and create an Auxiliary at the Auxiliary Salon
in the Shopping Plaza, then view the event
in your Personal Quarters.
